channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Turkey on alert as Iran conflict escalates, warns against provocations
item.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan says Ankara is monitoring the regional war involving Iran, the US, and Israel.

item.title: UNESCO condemns strike on Minab girls’ school: ‘They attacked twice… How
item.description: Secretary of Iran’s National Commission for UNESCO, condemned a missile strike on a girls’ primary school in Minab.

item.title: Six killed in attacks on Ukraine as EU extends sanctions against Russians
item.description: EU maintains pressure after slamming US for lifting sanctions on Russian oil exports as Middle East war bites.

item.title: Trump administration threatens news outlets over critical coverage of Iran
item.description: FCC chair says news outlets that share 'distortions' about US war with Iran could lose their licences.

item.title: Iranian woman explains ‘Allahu Akbar’ to Americans, amid explosion in Iran
item.description: Video shows an Iranian woman recording a message to Americans, amid an explosion in Iran.

item.title: Israeli settlers shoot Palestinians in West Bank villages, steal livestock
item.description: One Palestinian reported killed in Qusra, as others injured in Rashayda, amid surge in Israeli settler violence.

item.title: Iran warns UAE ports and ‘American hideouts’ are targets
item.description: An Iranian military spokesperson warned that ports, docks and “American hideouts” in the UAE could be targets.

item.title: Is the world ignoring Gaza?
item.description: Amid the US and Israel's war on Iran, we discuss the impact on diplomatic efforts and support for Palestine.

item.title: Trump says ‘many countries’ will send warships to Hormuz amid Iran blockade
item.description: US president urges naval coalition as Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed to 'tankers and ships of enemies' during war.

item.title: ‘Israel targeting Iran’s security forces may aim to encourage uprising’
item.description: ‘Israel targeting Iran’s security forces may aim to encourage uprising’ says director of the Iran Program at the MEI.
